rationale: Seeing exact counts/names is easiest if the chart options allow “Show data labels/table.” Opening the chart menu could expose that, letting us read the minimum precisely.

action_text: Hover over a small bar near the right end of the chart to reveal its tooltip
rationale: We need the minimum incident count and the agent(s) at that minimum. Hovering one of the smallest bars near the right should display a tooltip with the agent’s name and exact count.

action_text: Hover over the next small bar near the right end to show its tooltip
rationale: If the previous hover misses, hovering the adjacent small bar can reveal another candidate agent at the minimum count.

action_text: Hover over another small bar toward the right to display its tooltip
rationale: Continue identifying agents at the minimum by checking another very small bar; this helps confirm all agents with the least count.

action_text: Hover over a slightly larger (but still small) bar to read its tooltip
rationale: One more hover slightly further left can capture agents with 1–2 incidents to verify the exact minimum and who matches it.
